SharedItem.title: SharedItem
SharedItem.description: Metadata for a shared file or web link saved by the administrator

title.description: Name or title of the file or link

url.description: The URL or source base64 data

description.description: An optional description of the content

fileSize.description: File size in bytes if it is a file

fileType.description: MIME type if it is a file

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when this was created

clicks.description: Count of times the link or file was opened

tags.description: List of tags associated with the item

isPinned.description: Whether this item is pinned at the top

AdminConfig.title: AdminConfig
AdminConfig.description: Configuration for the admin portal, especially secure passwords

/shared_items/{itemId}.description: A collection containing some shared links or uploaded base64 mock files managed by admin.

/admin_config/{configId}.description: Storing administrator credentials/passwords for syncing across devices
